SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.logger

Interface StructuredConsoleAudience

All Superinterfaces:
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience
public interface StructuredConsoleAudience extends dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.Audience
Console audience capable of receiving structured log metadata directly.

    • sendConsole
